document_info.document_type: Commercial Property - Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics - LTL and FTL, general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Building and Personal Property Coverage Form CP 00 10 10 12. Building limit 64110000; contents limit 30320000; coinsurance 80%; deductible 50000.
Business Income and Extra Expense Coverage Form CP 15 08 attached. Pays actual loss of business income due to the necessary suspension of operations during the period of restoration.

Equipment Breakdown Coverage CP 04 09 attached. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to covered mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.
Agreed Value CP 99 30 attached. The coinsurance additional condition is suspended for scheduled property during the declarations period.
Utility Services - Direct Damage CP 04 17 attached. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.

fleet_summary.radius_of_operation: Regional operations across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors
